sections.title: Quick Start
sections.content: DexEarth is a high-performance tactical globe for synthesizing spatial data. Use the HUD on the right to toggle layers on and off. Left-click and drag the globe to pan, right-click and drag to zoom, and middle-click and drag to tilt. Use the 'Warp Home' button in the bottom left to instantly return to base.

sections.title: Layer Definitions
sections.content:
**Air Radar**:
Real-time flight tracking from the airplanes.live network. Points are plotted at altitude.

**Satellites**:
Low Earth Orbit (LEO) orbital propagation calculated locally via SGP4. The underlying TLE (Two-Line Element) catalog is cached offline.

**Seismic Sim**:
Global earthquake feed from the USGS. Event size and opacity are scaled to magnitude and time recency.

**Thermal / Fires**:
NASA FIRMS thermal anomaly data, primarily used for wildfire tracking. Shows spots detected by VIIRS and MODIS sensors over the past 24 hours.

sections.title: Overlays & Analytics
sections.content:
You can toggle vector overlays like **Country Borders** and **Tectonic Plates**. These features render using optimized Cesium geometry. Labels are dynamically spawned and scaled based on your camera altitude.

Analytic layers like **Threat Index** and **Correlation Engine** synthesize data from multiple active layers to render heatmaps and relational lines.

sections.title: Performance Governance
sections.content: DexEarth monitors playback framerate (FPS) in real-time. If framerate drops below 25 FPS for a sustained duration, the system engages **Safe Mode**. Safe Mode will shed visual complexity (e.g. disabling heavy labels, limiting geometry) to maintain stability. You can monitor system budgets in the 'Perf' section.

sections.title: Scenarios & Saved Views
sections.content: You can save the precise camera angle and layer configuration into 9 fast-access slots. Use **Alt+1..9** to load a view, and **Shift+Alt+1..9** to save your current view to a slot. You can also export a complete system offline snapshot as a JSON file in the 'Views' section.

sections.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
sections.content:
**Esc**: Cancel active tool / close popovers
**Alt+1..9**: Load saved view
**Shift+Alt+1..9**: Save current view
**Space**: Toggle time pause (if time controller active)
